title: Canonicity Stress-Test Across Alternative Operators

test_1.generates: All products of exponentials and sinusoids

test_2.generates: All continuous functions on compact intervals via iteration

test_4.depth_3: Any f using complex exp: EML-3

test_5.generates: Not universal (sqrt and log don't generate exp)

certificate.object: T174: Canonicity Certificate — multi-operator stress test passed
certificate.statement: 5 alternative operators tested. 4 universal operators all produce the identical {0,1,2,3,∞} hierarchy. 1 non-universal operator fails universality (excluded by definition). The hierarchy is CANONICAL: independent of operator choice among all universal generators of elementary functions.
certificate.invariant_structure: The universal structural invariant is: the real/complex dichotomy at the EML-2/EML-3 boundary. This dichotomy exists in ALL real/complex function classes regardless of generator chosen.

analysis.verdict: CANONICITY CONFIRMED: 4/4 universal operators agree on {0,1,2,3,∞}
analysis.theorem: T174: Canonicity Certificate — multi-operator stress test passed

key_theorem: T174: Canonicity Certificate (S453). 5 operator tests: exp*sin, Weierstrass gate, Dirichlet gate, Fourier gate, sqrt-log. 4 universal operators → all produce identical {0,1,2,3,∞} hierarchy. 1 non-universal excluded. Canonicity confirmed by multi-operator stress test.
rabbit_hole_log: exp*sin: generates all products, same hierarchy
sqrt-log: NOT universal (can't build exp) — excluded
